main.name: Amrutha Adiyath
main.description: I'm a full-stack developer who genuinely enjoys building software. With {{EXPERIENCE}} years of experience, I focus on creating clean, maintainable, and reliable applications across the front end, back end, and database layers.
main.bio: Hey, I'm Amrutha Adiyath from Moose Jaw, Saskatchewan. I've spent the last {{EXPERIENCE}} years building web applications using technologies like React, Java, Python, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL. Throughout my career, I've worked across the full stack, learning and adopting new technologies whenever a project required them. I'm always excited to pick up new tools and frameworks to solve real-world problems.
main.bio_p: When I'm away from the keyboard, you'll usually find me spending time with my husband and our five cats. I enjoy building small JavaScript and CSS experiments just for fun and have a passion for creating polished front-end experiences. I'm also a dedicated animal lover who spends my free time rescuing and fostering cats until they find their forever homes.
main.contactmessage: Have a project, opportunity, or just want to say hello? I'd love to hear from you.
funFacts: Full-stack developer by profession, certified cat wrangler by choice.
Moved from Thrissur, Kerala to Moose Jaw, Saskatchewan—traded palm trees for snowstorms.
I build JavaScript and CSS experiments for fun, even outside of work.
{{EXPERIENCE}} years of coding, five rescue cats, and one incredibly patient husband.
Currently rescuing cats, building software, and debugging both whenever necessary.

resume.skillmessage: Here are some of the technologies I've worked with throughout my career:

education.degree: Post Graduate Diploma in Technology Management
education.description: Strengthened my software development skills through hands-on projects using Java, Python, and SQL Server. I also gained experience in networking, Power BI, Agile project management, ITIL practices, business strategy, and data privacy.

education.degree: Bachelor's in Technology (Computer Science and Engineering)
education.description: Built a strong foundation in computer science through courses in algorithms, data structures, and software engineering. This is also where my passion for web development began, leading me to build personal and freelance websites that eventually helped me land my first development internship.

work.title: Technical and Client Resource Coordinator
work.description: Lead digital transformation initiatives for a high-demand nonprofit, designing and maintaining web and mobile applications that streamline client intake, volunteer scheduling, and appointment management. Built automated workflows and reporting tools that reduced manual effort, improved data accuracy, and enhanced service delivery for staff, volunteers, and clients.
bullets: Designed, developed, deployed, and maintain a full-stack web platform and companion mobile applications for client intake, volunteer scheduling, and appointment management.
Built an IVR booking system that allows clients without smartphones to schedule and manage appointments by phone.
Improved operational efficiency by automating workflows and reducing manual administrative tasks.
Delivered technical training and ongoing support for staff and volunteers.
Enhanced reporting and data accuracy through database optimization and process improvements.

work.title: Store Associate
work.description: Helped customers find the right products while delivering a friendly and knowledgeable shopping experience. Built lasting relationships with customers through excellent service, product knowledge, and genuine care for pets and their owners.
bullets: Provided exceptional customer service by helping customers find products tailored to their pets' needs.
Built lasting customer relationships through product knowledge, friendly communication, and personalized service.

work.title: Full-Stack Developer
work.description: Worked across the full stack, delivering modern web applications using React, Java, Python, and Node.js. Designed scalable backend services, optimized high-volume databases, and built responsive front-end experiences for enterprise clients while continuously improving application performance and reliability.
bullets: Developed responsive front-end applications using React and modern JavaScript.
Built scalable backend services using Java, Python, and Node.js.
Designed and optimized high-volume databases through query tuning, indexing, partitioning, and caching.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver reliable software for enterprise clients.

work.title: Developer Intern
work.description: Began my professional software development journey by transforming UI wireframes into responsive, production-ready web pages while learning modern front-end development practices.
bullets: Converted design wireframes into responsive, cross-browser web pages.
Learned modern front-end development practices while working on production projects.

volunteer.description: Foster and care for rescue cats by providing medical support, socialization, and a safe temporary home until they're ready for adoption.
Rescued and fostered stray cats, helping provide medical care, rehabilitation, and safe temporary homes while promoting animal welfare within the community.

certifications.name: IELTS
certifications.description: Achieved an overall IELTS Band Score of 8.0, including an 8.5 in Speaking, demonstrating strong professional English communication skills.
